title: ServiceSetupAssistantSettings - Metadata API
description: Represents an organization’s Service Setup Assistant settings. The Service Setup Assistant can be used to set up a basic service console app.

enableServiceSetupAssistant.description: Indicates whether the Service Setup Assistant is enabled (true) or not (false).

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: The following is an example of a ServiceSetupAssistantSettings component.
